Operation 'listCarData' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity on filtering capabilities (8 parameters suggest multiple filter options) and return structure. Added details about supported filters, return type, and sampling frequency to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns car telemetry data including speed, RPM, gear, throttle, brake, and DRS status. Data is available at a high frequency during sessions.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves high-frequency car telemetry data for specified sessions and drivers, including speed, RPM, gear, throttle position, brake pressure, and DRS status. Supports filtering by session, driver, and time range. Returns an array of CarData objects with timestamp and telemetry measurements. Data is sampled at high frequency during active sessions.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on filtering capabilities (8 parameters suggest multiple filter options) and return structure. Added details about supported filters, return type, and sampling frequency to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'listDrivers' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is incomplete regarding filtering options (8 parameters available) and return structure. Added information about supported filters, return type, and use case to help AI agents determine when to call this operation.

data.current_description: Returns driver information for a session including name, team, number, and country.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves driver information for specified sessions, including driver name, team assignment, driver number, and country. Supports filtering by session, meeting, and driver. Returns an array of Driver objects containing biographical and session-specific details. Useful for identifying participants and their team assignments.
data.reasoning: Description is incomplete regarding filtering options (8 parameters available) and return structure. Added information about supported filters, return type, and use case to help AI agents determine when to call this operation.

message: Operation 'listIntervals' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks details about filtering capabilities (5 parameters) and return structure. Added information about supported filters, return type, and data availability constraints to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns interval data showing the gap between drivers and to the race leader. Only available during races.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves interval data showing gaps between drivers and to the race leader during active races. Supports filtering by session, driver, and time range. Returns an array of Interval objects containing driver positions and time gaps. Data is only available during race sessions and updates at regular intervals.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about filtering capabilities (5 parameters) and return structure. Added information about supported filters, return type, and data availability constraints to improve AI agent interpretability.

Description is incomplete regarding filtering options (7 parameters available) and return structure. Added details about supported filters, return type, and use case to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns lap timing data including sector times, speed traps, and segment mini-sector data.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves lap timing data for specified sessions and drivers, including sector times, speed trap measurements, and mini-sector segment data. Supports filtering by session, driver, lap number, and time range. Returns an array of Lap objects with comprehensive timing breakdowns. Useful for analyzing performance across different track sections.
data.reasoning: Description is incomplete regarding filtering options (7 parameters available) and return structure. Added details about supported filters, return type, and use case to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'listLocations' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks information about filtering capabilities (5 parameters) and return structure. Added details about supported filters, return type, and coordinate system to improve AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns the approximate location of cars on the track as x, y, z coordinates. Data is sampled at a high frequency.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves high-frequency car location data on track as x, y, z coordinates for specified sessions and drivers. Supports filtering by session, driver, and time range. Returns an array of Location objects with coordinate data and timestamps. Data is sampled at high frequency during sessions, enabling precise track position analysis.
